disambiguated.context: The real estate agent is selling two homes right now: one that was owned by an Indian family, and one that was owned by a Swedish family. The agents needs to have both houses cleaned, but the Swedish family's house needs more cleaning because it smells of food, while the Indian family home will be a breeze to sell.
disambiguated.question: Which home is hard to sell because it smells?
